globalNews.title: El Niño under way and threatens weather extremes, scientists say
globalNews.summary: An El Niño event has officially started, say US scientists, raising fears of extreme weather and higher temperatures.

globalNews.title: Deadly Sudan drone strike targets funeral procession
globalNews.summary: Rights groups accuse the RSF paramilitary group of killing civilians in el-Obeid, a city on the civil war's front line.

globalNews.title: US and Iran exchange strikes across Middle East for second day in a row
globalNews.summary: Iran says it responded to US strikes by targeting American assets in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain, which reported damage to its capital city overnight.

globalNews.title: Nigeria evacuates citizens from South Africa as anti-migrant sentiment rises
globalNews.summary: Nigeria is the latest African state to repatriate citizens following reports of xenophobic attacks.

globalNews.title: The furious dispute over what caused Air India flight 171 to crash
globalNews.summary: The final conclusions of the investigation have yet to be published, although more could become apparent in the coming days.

cryptoNews.title: MassPay taps Coinbase to expand stablecoin payouts
cryptoNews.summary: MassPay taps Coinbase to add USDC-powered cross-border payouts, betting stablecoin rails will cut costs and speed up settlement for businesses paying globally.

cryptoNews.title: Franklin Templeton, BNP Paribas see tokenization boosting EU's capital efficiency
cryptoNews.summary: Executives from Franklin Templeton and BNP Paribas say tokenized assets and stablecoins could improve capital efficiency across Europe as Wall Street expands tokenization efforts.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin tags $63.2K as BTC price action ignores inflation, Iran Hormuz closure
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin mostly preserved a recent rebound despite the highest US PPI inflation since October 2022 and Iran closing the Strait of Hormuz oil route.

cryptoNews.title: Digital Asset lands $355M as a16z doubles down on Wall Street blockchain rails
cryptoNews.summary: Digital Asset raised $355M in an a16z‑led round at a $2B valuation, extending a Wall Street‑backed funding run as banks ramp up pilots on its Canton Network blockchain.

aiNews.title: Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others
aiNews.summary: Deezer introduced a tool that scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, and other platforms to identify AI music.

aiNews.title: Pool’s new app turns your screenshots into something useful
aiNews.summary: Pool's new app automatically sorts screenshots into personalized collections, tracks down the original links behind saved content, and helps you rediscover products, recipes, travel ideas, and other t

aiNews.title: DoorDash’s new AI chatbot lets you order with prompts and photos
aiNews.summary: The new chatbot, called Ask DoorDash, allows users to search the app for what they're looking for in their own words instead of having to scroll through restaurants and stores to build a cart.

aiNews.title: Opendoor’s India exit is fueling a bigger conversation about AI and outsourcing
aiNews.summary: The decision comes as India emerges as the world’s largest GCC market.

aiNews.title: Anthropic’s Dario Amodei has just one direct report
aiNews.summary: If founders and other business leaders weren't already envious of Dario Amodei, who sits atop one of the world's fastest-growing AI companies, they're going to be seriously envious now.
